uses: Kalinia obtusiflora is a plant species that has been traditionally used in folk medicine. Its roots and leaves are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Kalinia obtusiflora is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Additionally, the plant is used to reduce pain and swelling, as well as to treat skin conditions. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential benefits of Kalinia obtusiflora.
